create_storage_item: create a new item in the Storage class by id and Pydantic model data
read_storage_item: read an item from the Storage class by its unique id
upsert_storage_item: upsert an item in the Storage class creating or updating by id
delete_storage_item: delete an item from the Storage class by its unique id
set_keyvalue: set a key-value pair in the KeyValueStorage class for arbitrary JSON data
